assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create an OptiView Real-time account, create a publish token, broadcast a webcam stream from the dashboard, and view it in the hosted Viewer.

first_success.outcome: The developer broadcasts webcam audio and video from the OptiView dashboard and views the stream after its server round trip in the hosted Viewer.
first_success.observable_signal: The broadcaster shows LIVE and the hosted Viewer plays the stream.

route_selection.surface: OptiView Real-time Streaming Part 1 dashboard broadcast
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Dashboard-only Part 1 broadcast and hosted viewer
candidates.reason: Account-creation and authentication transitions are not publicly enumerated.

candidates.name: SDK or code-first publish path
candidates.reason: Longer implementation surface than the documented dashboard Part 1 route, once account steps are known.

required_path.action: Create and sign in to an OptiView Real-time / Dolby streaming account.
Create a publish token in the dashboard.
required_path.observable_result: A publish token is available for broadcasting.

required_path.action: Start a webcam broadcast from the Streaming Dashboard.
Open the hosted Viewer and confirm playback.
required_path.observable_result: The Viewer plays the live stream.

prerequisites.description: A streaming account is required before dashboard broadcast.

external_gates.description: Browser camera and microphone permission prompts.

platform_outcomes.description: Dolby OptiView relays the live stream to the hosted Viewer.

excluded.item: Reading terms pages beyond acceptance controls actually shown
excluded.reason: Legal pages alone are not product interactions.

sources.title: Getting started with OptiView Real-time Streaming

uncertainties.question: What exact account-creation, terms, and authentication transitions appear before the Streaming Dashboard?
uncertainties.impact: Blocks verified account-step fields and counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthrough from signup through first LIVE broadcast and Viewer playback.
